Erythroxylum coca tinctures is used to alleviate symptoms of addiction and withdrawal from opioid dependence. It has been traditionally used in South American countries to reduce stress, anxiety, and fatigue. The tincture contains alkaloids such as cocaine and cocaine-free extracts, which have been shown to improve mental clarity, boost mood, and enhance cognitive function. Additionally, it may help alleviate symptoms of ADHD, depression, and chronic pain, although further research is needed to confirm these effects.

Erythroxylum coca ointments is used to alleviate various health issues. Topical applications of coca ointment have been found effective in treating wounds, bruises, and sprains by promoting blood clotting and reducing inflammation. It has also been traditionally used to relieve symptoms of arthritis, joint pain, and muscle cramps. Additionally, coca ointments may help reduce anxiety and stress by stimulating the release of endorphins, providing relief from mental fatigue.

intro: Erythroxylum coca has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and extracts. These preparations are useful for alleviating symptoms of altitude sickness, headaches, and digestive issues due to its caffeine-like properties. Additionally, coca tea is often consumed to help with fatigue, stress relief, and improving mental clarity. In some traditional practices, coca leaf infusions are used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, while the tincture can be applied topically to relieve pain and reduce inflammation.
intro_desc: Erythroxylum coca has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures. These preparations are often used to alleviate fatigue, anxiety, and stress, while also stimulating the digestive system and improving mental clarity. Additionally, coca preparations have been traditionally used to help with altitude sickness and to provide relief from pain and inflammation. However, it's essential to note that the use of coca is heavily regulated in many countries.
